1.premise: Hip hop in the shower could turn normal hygiene into racially and sexually incriminating behavior.
Singing along to hip hop uncensored in private could be reframed as a racist act.

2.premise: Washing yourself while Diddy's heavy breathing plays could be reframed as participation in his crimes.

lines.text: How's it going, Austin?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It has become problematic for me to take showers
lines.label: setup

lines.text: alone again recently.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And that is because I listen to hip hop in the shower.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I do not censor myself when Wu-Tang comes on.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Thank you.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: But recently, Kanye was on my speaker.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was washing my armpits and I just,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I kinda just felt a little strange
lines.label: setup

lines.text: when I was listening to Kanye, so I had to skip the song.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm sure you guys know which song it was.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But after I skipped that song,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Puff Daddy and the Family came on
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and it was "Fittin' to Get Loose."
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I don't know if you guys know this,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but the first like 20 to 30 seconds of that song
lines.label: setup

lines.text: is Puffed Daddy just breathing heavy like
lines.label: setup

lines.text: (breathing heavily)
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: and I'm washing my asshole
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and "Fittin' to Get Loose" is on
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I just prayed that I was the only one in there
lines.label: setup

lines.text: but I realized it's very easy to become racist and gay
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: by listening to hip hop.
lines.label: tag
